summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job is not a dedupe cluster. Closed PR #80438 stays closed; security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security; active non-security PRs are kept or escalated only for the specific maintainer/technical decision that remains.

actions.reason: Already closed refs must not receive close actions.
Keep the PR open, but maintainer judgment is required before any merge or repair path.
Security-sensitive item must be quarantined to central OpenClaw security handling.
The open draft branch is superseded by a hydrated merged PR that owns the same root fix.
Active contributor PR with useful code and recent author signal needs maintainer technical review, not closeout.
Memory isolation and cross-user data-boundary work belongs in central security handling.
This is an active non-security PR in a related message-delivery family; keep open for focused review.
Active non-security fix candidate should remain open; merge/fix actions are disabled in this plan job.
Protected path and backup exclusion boundary changes are security-sensitive and out of ProjectClownfish cleanup scope.
Gateway public-network hardening is security-sensitive and must route to central OpenClaw security handling.

needs_human: #22439 requires maintainer/product and technical correctness review before any merge or repair path.
#77127 requires maintainer technical review of ClawSweeper findings before merge or repair.
